name: Telegram → Skills Router

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $json.matched ? '✓ Routed to: ' + $json.skill.name : '⚠ No matching skill found for: ' + $('Validate & Extract Intent').item.json.intent }}

_comment: Import via n8n UI: Workflows → Import from file. Set env vars TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SKILLS_ROUTER_URL, SKILLS_ROUTER_SECRET before activating.
